info.title: CBRICS – Protocol for Web API
info.description: Web APIs to programmatically access and exchange data with CBRICS Platform (HOST system). National Stock Exchange of India Ltd. Version 1.15.

post.description: Authenticates the user and creates a session. Returns loginKey for subsequent requests.
Adds a new deal reporting (seller) or buyer standing instruction.
Updates an existing deal reporting or buyer standing instruction. Requires id.

get.description: Returns all sell reportings for the day where logged-in user is buyer/seller/broker.

post.description: Returns sell reportings with filters: orderNumber, symbol, filtEntryDate, buyParticipantLoginId, sellParticipantLoginId.

get.description: Returns all buyer instructions entered by the participant as buyer.

post.description: Used by buyer to accept (7) or reject (2) sell order reporting.
Market-wide summary of trading data for issues that have traded today.
Returns participants/custodians for given filter: loginId, type (2=Participant, 13=Custodian), custodian, panNo.
Submits request for addition of a new unregistered participant. Subject to approval.
Only for workflowStatus 16 (returned by checker) or 6 (returned by exchange).

post.summary: Update contact of approved unregistered participant
Add bank account for unregistered participant
List bank accounts with filters (participantCode, workflowStatus)
Set bank account as default for payout
Add DP account for unregistered participant

post.description: Returns orders for settlement in the given date range (max 30 days).

post.summary: Update settlement order (quantity, consideration, custodians, date)

get.description: Opens the payment page URL. Access in browser. Query: fundPayinRefId.

post.description: Filter date range max 30 days. Min 1 field required: id, fundPayinRefId, orderNumber, filtFromDate, filtToDate.
Client-implemented. Exchange POSTs notifications (order status, settle order, unreg, bank/dp, paytxn). Auth: HmacSHA256 of body in header 'token' (HEX).

loginKey.name: loginKey
loginKey.description: Token from login response. Required for all APIs except login.
